creator: cjohnson@neunacht.netgsi.com
text:
When the system is running the SMP kernel, more than a buffer full of
sound will cause the sytem to lock up.  If running X, the cursor
stops moving and ctrl-alt-del, ctlr-alt-bs fails to free the system.

If fdformat /dev/rfd0.1440 is attempted, 3 to 5 Vs are printed and then
the system locks up hard.  It requires a hardware reset to break the
system free.
	

The same actions running a UP will work fine.  The UP configuration file
is the same as the SMP configuration file with the exception that the 
UP has the SMP options commented out.

How-To-Repeat: See above.
